metadata.title: GS1 KSA Digital Tools | Barcode Management & Verification
metadata.description: Access official GS1 Saudi Arabia tools including Check Digit Calculator, GTIN Management, and Verified by GS1 for SFDA and ZATCA compliance.

hero.title: GS1 Digital Toolset
hero.subtitle: Empowering Saudi businesses with precise tools for global identification and supply chain visibility.

metadata.title: Check Digit Calculator | GS1 Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: Verify the integrity of your GS1 identifiers (GTIN, GLN, SSCC) with our official calculator.

hero.title: Check Digit Calculator
hero.subtitle: Ensure your barcodes are valid before printing.

mainSection.title: Verify Your Identifier
mainSection.description: The check digit is the last number in a GS1 identification key. It is calculated from all the previous numbers and ensures the barcode is correctly constructed.
mainSection.componentLabel: Enter your GS1 number (GTIN-8, 12, 13, 14 or SSCC)

features.title: Multi-Format
features.description: Supports GTIN, GLN, SSCC, and GRAI identifiers.

features.title: Error Prevention
features.description: Prevents costly printing errors by validating math logic.

steps.title: Select Format
steps.description: Choose the type of GS1 key you are using.

steps.title: Enter Sequence
steps.description: Type the numbers excluding the last digit.

steps.title: Calculate
steps.description: The tool will generate the correct check digit automatically.

faq.question: Why is the check digit important?
faq.answer: It prevents scanning errors at Point of Sale or in warehouses.

faq.question: Does this work for SSCC?
faq.answer: Yes, it supports the 18-digit Serial Shipping Container Code.

cta.title: Print with Confidence
cta.description: Avoid re-printing costs by verifying your data first.

metadata.title: GTIN Management & Estimation | GS1 KSA
metadata.description: Plan your product identification strategy for the Saudi market.

hero.title: GTIN Management
hero.subtitle: Optimize your barcode allocation for diverse product portfolios.

mainSection.title: Estimate Your Requirements
mainSection.description: Determine exactly how many Global Trade Item Numbers (GTINs) your business needs based on SKU variations, sizes, and packaging types.

steps.title: Define SKUs
steps.description: Identify all unique product variants (size, color, flavor).

steps.title: Packaging Levels
steps.description: Account for individual items, cases, and pallets.

steps.title: Growth Forecast
steps.description: Consider upcoming product launches over the next 24 months.

steps.title: Allocation
steps.description: Receive a recommended GS1 Company Prefix capacity.

cta.title: Apply for GTINs
cta.description: Get your official GS1 Company Prefix registered in Saudi Arabia.
